title.rendered: Word Types – Overview of Wordtypes – Sanatyypit

content.rendered:
This page dives a little deeper in the different parts of speech: adjectives, nouns, pronouns, conjunctions, clitics and affixes. In addition, it contains information about specific wordtypes in Finnish. This is important when inflecting words in the different cases.

Confusing words

PARTS OF SPEECH

Adjectives

    • Most common adjectives
    • Adjectives and opposites
    • Basic adjective sayings
    • Top 916 adjectives
    • Compound adjectives
    • Typical compound adjectives
    • Adjectives with fixed modifiers
    • Proadjectives tällainen sellainen

Adverbs

    • Adverbs overview
    • Adverbs of time
    • Adverbs of manner
    • Adverbs of intensity
    • Adverbs of location
    • Adverbs of probability

Post- and Prepositions

    • Postpositions
    • The inflection of postpositions
    • Prepositions
    • Post- and prepositions list

Pronouns

    • Overview
    • Demonstrative: tämä tuo se
    • Interrogative: question words
    • Relative pronoun joka
    • Joka jonka jota joiden
    • Joku and jokin
    • Reflexive pronoun itse
    • Pronoun toinen

Conjunctions

    • Conjunctions overview
    • Conjunctions and other connectives
    • Ja sekä ynnä
    • Paired conjunctions
    • Connectives (siinä tapauksessa)
    • Muttei vaikkei ettei – contractions

Clitics – Liitepartikkelit

    • The order of Finnish suffixes
    • Possessive suffixes
    • -han/-hän
    • -kin/-kaan/-kään
    • -pa/-pä
Confusing words

FINNISH WORDTYPES

Wordtypes

    • Kotus wordtype 7: ovi ovea oven
    • Kotus wordtype 25: toimi toimea tointa
    • Kotus wordtype 26: pieni pientä pienen
    • Kotus wordtype 27: uusi uutta uuden
    • Words ending in a consonant – overview

Consonant gradation

    • Wordtype A consonant gradation
    • Wordtype B consonant gradation

Plurale tantum nouns

    • Categories
    • Always plural clothing
    • Always plural celebrations
    • Syntax of always plural words
